nwfscDiscard 2.1
  • Get started
  • Reference

    Format GEMM alternative data to match the WCGOP

    format_gemm_alt.Rd

    Format GEMM alternative data to match the WCGOP

    format_gemm_alt(
  dir,
  species_name,
  areas_to_keep,
  gears_to_keep,
  data_file = "SATAN_GEMM_2026-04-12.csv"
)

    Arguments

    dir

    Directory where output will be saved. The directory where the file should be saved. If dir = NULL no output will be saved.

    species_name

    A string to specify the species name that data should be summarized for. The string should match the name in the alternative gemm data file and needs to be a single species.

    areas_to_keep

    A vector of area names in the alternative GEMM to filter the data for.

    gears_to_keep

    A vector of gear names in the alternative GEMM to filter the data for.

    data_file

    A string of the CSV file name of the alternative GEMM data provided by the FOS team for calculating data weights using alternative areas. The gear type (minor) and the gear group (major) are used to calculate totals by area and weighting proportions.

    Value

    dataframe

    Author

    Chantel Wetzel

    Contents

    Developed by Chantel R. Wetzel.

    Site built with pkgdown 2.2.0.
